stemHtml: The combination of factors that most requires a low-angled flap setting for take-off is…

options.a: High field elevation, no obstacles in the climb-out path, low ambient temperature and short runway.
options.b: High field elevation, distant obstacles in the climb-out path, long runway and a high ambient temperature.
options.c: Low field elevation, close-in obstacles in the climb-out path, short runway and a high ambient temperature.
options.d: Low field elevation, no obstacles in the climb-out path, short runway and a low ambient temperature.
